description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single pages job (implicitly in the deploy stage) using the default Docker image. The job must run the commands: git submodule init, git submodule update, mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. After the script finishes, it should publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No extra stages, caches, or rules are required.
